personal.name: Salman Sheriff
personal.title: Backend & Software Engineer
personal.tagline: BUILDING ELEGANT SOLUTIONS FROM IDEA TO EXECUTION. High-performance backend architecture meets artistic user interface precision.
personal.philosophy: I believe that software should be as resilient as it is beautiful. My focus is on creating scalable, clean, and maintainable systems that empower users. With a deep foundation in full-stack architecture, I bridge the gap between complex logic and seamless human-computer interaction.

projects.title: Employee Management
projects.description: A high-performance, full-stack Employee Management System built with Java Spring Boot and React. Features a fluid, responsive dashboard styled with Tailwind CSS and GSAP to deliver real-time attendance tracking, dynamic task allocation, and secure data management without operational lag

achievements.title: Real-time Metrics
achievements.description: Integrated sub-5ms WebSocket connections to sync task assignments and attendance reports across dashboards.

achievements.title: Enterprise Architecture
achievements.description: Designed multi-tenant Spring security protocols and seed databases, optimizing query throughput by 30%.

projects.title: Patient management System
projects.description: A modern, full-stack Patient Management System engineered for seamless healthcare administration. Built with a Next.js and Framer Motion frontend for server-side efficiency and fluid UI transitions, the application is backed by a robust Java Spring Boot architecture. It provides a secure, responsive platform for managing patient records, clinical workflows, and real-time scheduling with optimal data persistence.

achievements.title: Zero-Trust Encryption
achievements.description: Enforced secure enclave DB encryption for patient health records to align with strict HIPAA standards.

achievements.title: Dynamic Scheduler
achievements.description: Engineered automated clinical scheduling pipelines that reduced appointment overlap by 40%.
